summary: Reason-aware reformulation gate passed in local validation. Reject reason clustering and reformulated queries are persisted into run checkpoint payloads and covered by tests.
checks: backend/tests/test_retrieval_quality.py covers reject-reason clustering and reformulation output.
Runner query_attempts now store reason_cluster and reformulated_queries for production analysis.
CP6 monitoring script was upgraded to surface reformulation evidence from step checkpoints.
